intro: OpenAI has filed confidentially with the SEC for an initial public offering, expected to value the ChatGPT maker at over $850 billion. Apple introduced AI-enhanced features across its ecosystem, including Siri AI integration in watchOS 27 and a standalone Siri app in macOS 27 Golden Gate. Meta disclosed that hackers exploited its AI support bot to compromise over 20,000 Instagram accounts by linking victims' accounts to attacker-controlled emails.

whitelist.title: Establishing AI and data sovereignty in the age of autonomous systems
whitelist.desc: When generative AI first moved from research labs into real-world business applications, enterprises made a tacit bargain: “Capability now, control later.” Feed your proprietary data into third-party AI models, and you will get powerful results. But your data passes through systems you do not own, under governance you do not set. The protections you rely…
